text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
choice_data_list: Wow, that was a big yawn.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, I couldn't sleep a wink after
getting into bed last night...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They say that stressing about falling asleep just
makes it worse, so I just laid on my side and tried
not to worry about it...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But I was still wide awake when the sun came up... Maybe I should've tried harder to fall asleep? Yaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Hishi Akebono had a pretty restless
night...
